requirements.requirement: Implement threat intelligence and threat hunting capabilities for capital market-specific threats
requirements.rationale: Proactive threat management reduces risk of successful cyber attacks on market infrastructure

requirements.requirement: Establish security monitoring with 24/7 coverage for critical market infrastructure
requirements.rationale: Ensures continuous surveillance of critical trading and settlement systems

requirements.requirement: Implement systematic vulnerability management with risk-based patching SLAs
requirements.rationale: Reduces attack surface for capital market systems

requirements.requirement: Design and maintain secure network architecture with segmentation for trading and market data networks
requirements.rationale: Protects market infrastructure from lateral movement and unauthorised access
